positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring a stylized, majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo at the zenith to soft peach near the horizon. In the foreground, abstract, stylized flora (e.g., monstera leaves, ferns, geometric succulents) cascade upwards, filling the lower third of the frame. The style is highly graphic, utilizing clean lines and flat areas of contrasting color, reminiscent of modern botanical posters but with a minimalist, geometric edge. Lighting should simulate soft, ambient backlighting, emphasizing the crisp edges of the foliage and mountain contours. Color palette: deep jewel tones (emerald, sapphire) contrasted with warm pastels (peach, cream). Perfect for screen printing or high-quality textile transfer. Vector-art quality, high contrast, clean edges, print-friendly.
negative: photorealistic, logo, watermark, signature, text, gradient noise, blurry, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, low detail, messy, cluttered, monochrome
